title: SPION-mediated Lysosome Purification – RAW264.7
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7qnri","text":"This protocol details steps taken to isolate lysosomes in RAW 264.7 cells.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"pf6i","text":"DMEM (Thermo Fisher Scientific, 11965-092)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8kbb","text":"FBS (Thermo Fisher Scientific, 16140-071)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3581b","text":"Penicillin/Streptomycin (Thermo Fisher Scientific, 15140122)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"84tkf","text":"CellStripper (Corning, 356230)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cpnmp","text":"PBS [1.1 mM KH2PO4 (J.T. Baker, 3246-01), 155.2 mM NaCl (Sigma-Aldrich, 3624-05), and 3 mM Na2HPO4 (J.T. Baker, 3828-05)]","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7eea2","text":"SPION Particles (see https://www.protocols.io/view/synthesis-of-colloidal-dextran-conjugated-superpar-eq2lyn69pvx9/v1)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fk72g","text":"5 mM HEPES (pH 7.4, Thermo Fisher Scientific, 15630-080)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3a169","text":"HB buffer (5 mM Tris Base (American Bio, AB02000-05000), 250 mM Sucrose (Sigma-Aldrich, S0389), and 1 mM EGTA pH 7.4, Sigma-Aldrich, E4378) supplemented with inhibitors [cOmplete mini EDTA-free protease inhibitor (Roche, 11836170001) and PhosSTOP (Roche, 4906837001)]","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dav6e","text":"Dounce Homogenizers (DWK Life Sciences WheatonTM Dounce Tissue grinders, 06-434)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1a640","text":"LS columns (Miltenyi Biotec, 130042401)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"214h4","text":"QuadroMACS separator (Miltenyi Biotec, 130-091-051)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Split a ~90% confluent 15-cm dish of RAW 264.7 cells into 8 10-cm dishes.
4 10-cm dishes are sufficient for one condition (for example, WT DMSO treatment).
Replace the media in each dish with DMEM containing FBS and P/S supplemented with 5 mM HEPES and 5% SPION particles for 01:00:00 .
Wash each dish 2X with PBS.
Add fresh media (DMEM containing FBS and P/S) to wash out the SPIONs for 02:00:00 .
At this point, any drug treatment can be added.
Wash each dish 2X with cold PBS on ice. Scrape each dish with 1 mL of PBS and combine each condition into a 15-mL Falcon tube.
For example, all 4 10-cm dishes from WT DMSO condition into 1 Falcon tube.
Centrifuge 300 rcf, 4 °C, 5 minutes each 15-mL Falcon tube.
Remove the supernatant and resuspend the pellet in 1 mL ice-cold HB buffer for 00:05:00 on ice.
HB buffer: 5 mM Tris Base, 250 mM Sucrose, and 1 mM EGTA pH 7.4 supplemented withinhibitors (cOmplete mini EDTA-free protease inhibitor and PhosSTOP).
Transfer the lysate to a Dounce homogenizer and homogenize 50 times each sample with the tight pestle on ice.
Centrifuge 800 rcf, 4 °C, 10 minutes the lysate to obtain the cell lysate.
At this step, a portion of the supernatant cell lysate was kept for the “Cell Lysate”.
Wash LC columns once with 2.5 mL of HB buffer on a QuadroMACS separator.
Apply the remainder of the supernatant/cell lysate to the LC columns. Collect the flow-through and reapply it to the column.
Wash LC columns with 3 mL of HB buffer on a QuadroMACS separator.
Remove LC columns from the QuadroMACS separator and elute lysosomes inao ultracentrifuge tubes with 2.5 mL of HB buffer.
Ultracentrifuge 55000 rpm, 4 °C, 20 minutes using a TLA-100.3 rotor in a Beckman-Coulter Ultracentrifuge Max Optima.
Remove the supernatant and resuspend the lysosome pellet in 50 µL of HB buffer and freeze at -20C.

Quantify protein concentrations using Coomassie Plus Protein Assay Reagent as per the manufacturer’s protocol. Prepare lysates for immunoblotting as in the Protein Lysate and Immunoblotting protocol.io.
creator: Amanda Bentley-DeSousa
